ratings.comment: I loved Dr. Reynolds, but 528 is a HARD class. Lectures are very dense and the whole class is graded on just 3 midterms and a final exam. However, Dr. Reynolds holds office hours (and brings candy), and is very good at explaining concepts in a smaller setting. Also very responsive to email and understanding of student situations.

Professor Reynold's lectures are interesting and straightforward. Definitely recommend going to office hours as he is great about answering questions, reviewing tough concepts, and clearly cares about helping students learn/succeed in the class.

Dr. Reynolds was amazing! Genuinely one of my favorite professors I think I have ever had. He made a very difficult subject completely digestible and I am so grateful I crossed paths with this honestly inspirational man. Go to lectures and go to his office hours, you will learn and he is so eager to help

Dr. Reynolds was one of my favorite professors at UW. He is very knowledgeable about the subject materials and gives interesting lectures. He clearly outlines what you need to take away from each lecture, and hosts weekly office hours if you need extra help. The exams were pretty easy. Good, interesting class overall
